import axios from'axios';import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ServiceList=()=>{const[services,setServices]=useState([]);const[categories,setCategories]=useState([]);const[selectedCategory,setSelectedCategory]=useState('');const[search,setSearch]=useState('');// Загрузка списка услуг и категорий
useEffect(()=>{fetchServices();fetchCategories();},[selectedCategory,search]);const fetchServices=async()=>{try{const queryParams=[];if(selectedCategory)queryParams.push("category=".concat(selectedCategory));if(search)queryParams.push("search=".concat(search));const queryString=queryParams.length>0?"?".concat(queryParams.join('&')):'';const response=await axios.get("".concat(process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL,"/api/services/").concat(queryString));setServices(response.data);}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching services:',error);}};const fetchCategories=async()=>{try{const response=await axios.get("".concat(process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL,"/api/services/categories/"));setCategories(response.data);}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching categories:',error);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Our Services"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Filter by Category: "}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("select",{value:selectedCategory,onChange:e=>setSelectedCategory(e.target.value),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:"",children:"All"}),categories.map(category=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:category.id,children:category.name},category.id))]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"Search services...",value:search,onChange:e=>setSearch(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{children:services.map(service=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:service.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:service.description}),service.image&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:service.image,alt:service.name,width:"200"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Category:"})," ",service.category.name]})]},service.id))})]});};export default ServiceList;
